calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The Court orders balance of case dismissed. Judge Cynthia Lee presiding. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2013 Continued To Dec-10-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Dec-10-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2013 Continued To Oct-22-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to OCT-22-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2013 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-20-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2013 Continued To Jul-17-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer Of Defendants Jp Morgan Chase Bank, N.A. And California Reconveyance Company To Plaintiffs' Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Tentative ruling adopted as follows: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer Of Defendants Jp Morgan Chase Bank, N.A. And California Reconveyance Company To Plaintiffs' Complaint is Sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiffs' complaint is barred by res judicata as it arises out of the same facts as Complaint brought in and dismissed with prejudice by District Court on April 27, 2011. No opposition filed. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS JP MORGAN CHASE BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Transferred to Department 501, the Housing Court, to be heard on the same date and time. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
